modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live chat session and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a warm and approachable tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be no spelling errors and some irrelevant details included.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Unable to access Outlook Web Access after email setup.

full_description_text: The user set up their email account but can't log in to Outlook Web Access. They received an error message saying "BootResult: accessDenied." This issue came up during our chat, and they seemed quite frustrated. It’s important for them to access their email for work.
short_description: Unable to access Outlook Web Access after email setup.
description: The user set up their email account but can't log in to Outlook Web Access. They received an error message saying "BootResult: accessDenied." This issue came up during our chat, and they seemed quite frustrated. It’s important for them to access their email for work.
